channel.title: Reverse Engineering on IamAlch3mist blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Reverse Engineering on IamAlch3mist blogs

item.title: Introduction to shellcode execution
item.description: Introduction Hey, everyone in this short blog post I’m going to discuss about shellcode execution in windows environment. I know there are a lot of blogs about this topic available online, lately I started learning windows internals and malware development & exploitation on windows platform so I’m writing this blogs to document my process for my own future references. In this blog I’m not going to show any crazy EDR/Anti-virus or AMSI bypass techniques, rather I’m covering the foundational knowledge required to get started in malware development.
